query:
WITH inserted AS (
                INSERT INTO messages (channel_id, author_id, content, encrypted, sender_device_id)
                VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
                RETURNING
                    id,
                    channel_id,
                    author_id,
                    content,
                    edited_at,
                    deleted_at,
                    deleted_by,
                    encrypted,
                    sender_device_id,
                    message_type,
                    system_event_key,
                    created_at
            )
            SELECT
                i.id as "id!",
                i.channel_id as "channel_id!",
                i.author_id as "author_id!",
                i.content,
                i.edited_at,
                i.deleted_at,
                i.deleted_by,
                i.encrypted as "encrypted!",
                i.sender_device_id,
                i.message_type as "message_type!: String",
                i.system_event_key,
                i.created_at as "created_at!",
                p.username AS "author_username?",
                p.avatar_url AS "author_avatar_url?"
            FROM inserted i
            LEFT JOIN profiles p ON p.id = i.author_id
